twitter_thread: 87% of Foundation Models deployments fail to improve workflows, with 40% of failures due to poor data prep.
Prioritize data prep with feature attribution, which can reduce errors by 25%.
Ditch 'model-centric' thinking: task-specific fine-tuning can boost accuracy by 15%.
Schedule regular retraining every 6 months to combat 12% average annual performance degradation.
Use LIME or SHAP to diagnose issues, reducing error rates by 30% in some cases.
Log and track 500 errors to identify patterns and improve Foundation Models.
What's the most costly mistake you've made with Foundation Models? #foundationmodels #ai
